text.title: Trunk-Based Development Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the trunk-based-dev-patterns methodology end-to-end.

step.name: name-flag-positively
step.action: Compose flag name as <area>.<verb>_<thing> with positive verb. Reject negative shapes.

step.name: file-cleanup-ticket
step.action: Open cleanup ticket in tracker; link from .aidocs/feature-flags.md.

step.name: chunk-into-24h-prs
step.action: Break into PRs each < 24h to merge. Apply BbA if refactor scale demands.

step.name: plan-dark-launch-ramp
step.action: Define ramp steps starting < 1% for a full diurnal cycle; thresholds for next ramp / hold / rollback.

step.name: verify-gates-in-place
step.action: Confirm trunk-based-ci-gates artefact is green; CI p95 < 10 min; auto-revert wired; linear history.
